category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/mac-cain13/R.swift describes strongly typed resources for Swift projects.
source_facts.description says it provides strongly typed autocompleted resources like images, fonts, and segues.
display_name_sources: Official repository name is R.swift at https://github.com/mac-cain13/R.swift.
source_facts.homepage points to the official R.swift repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for installation and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mac-cain13/R.swift, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents Swift project integration and generated resource APIs.
source_facts.description mentions Swift resource typing for images, fonts, and segues.
